allow: Bash(node -e 'const data = require\("./public/data/knowledge-base.json"\); console.log\("Total entries:", data.length\); const cats = {}; data.forEach\(e => { cats[e.category] = \(cats[e.category] || 0\) + 1; }\); console.log\("By category:"\); Object.entries\(cats\).sort\(\).forEach\(\([k,v]\) => console.log\("  " + k + ": " + v\)\); const ids = data.map\(e => e.id\); const dupes = ids.filter\(\(id, i\) => ids.indexOf\(id\) !== i\); console.log\("Duplicate IDs:", dupes.length ? dupes : "none"\); console.log\("JSON is valid."\);')

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('public/data/knowledge-base.json'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)
print\('Total entries:', len\(data\)\)
cats = {}
for e in data:
    cats[e['category']] = cats.get\(e['category'], 0\) + 1
print\('By category:'\)
for k in sorted\(cats\):
    print\(f'  {k}: {cats[k]}'\)
ids = [e['id'] for e in data]
dupes = [x for x in ids if ids.count\(x\) > 1]
print\('Duplicate IDs:', set\(dupes\) if dupes else 'none'\)
print\('JSON is valid.'\)
")
